question: How can you secure the motherboard to the chassis?
content:
Place the motherboard in the chassis with the external-port edge toward the rear, then install nine screws in the circled screw holes to secure it.<PIC>
Do not overtighten the screws, because this can damage the motherboard.
ret: "Place the motherboard in the chassis with the external-port edge toward the rear, then install nine screws in the circled screw holes to secure it.<PIC>\nDo not overtighten the screws, because this can damage the motherboard.",["Manual25_6"]
notes: The answer uses the motherboard overview, placement direction, screw holes, and the adjacent figure showing the circled mounting holes.
